description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named MacOS-CI that runs on push and pull request events for the master and devel branches, and on specific pull requests for release/v3.0.0. Run three parallel macos-latest jobs: MacOS-Framework, MacOS-Ref, and MacOS-Integration. Each job checks out the repository, sets up the environment, runs a specific F prime CI test script, and archives the logs for 5 days.
